task_completion.description: Verify the document title is centered, bold, and 14pt on the first page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'PROFESSIONAL SERVICES AGREEMENT' at the very top of the document is centered, bolded, and visibly larger (14pt) than the standard body text.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Heading 1' style is applied to all nine top-level section headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 9 main section headings (Definitions, Scope of Services, Fees and Payment, Intellectual Property, Confidentiality, Representations and Warranties, Limitation of Liability, Indemnification, General Provisions) are styled as Heading 1 (typically larger, bolded, and distinct from body text, often visible in the style dropdown).

task_completion.description: Verify 'Heading 2' style is applied to all subsection headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Subsection headings (e.g., under Scope of Services or Fees) are styled as Heading 2, appearing distinct from both Heading 1 and standard body text.

task_completion.description: Verify the specified defined terms are bolded in the Definitions section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Definitions section, the terms 'Services', 'Deliverables', 'Confidential Information', 'Intellectual Property Rights', and 'Force Majeure Event' are formatted in bold text.

task_completion.description: Verify a borderless 2-column table is created for the signature block at the end of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At the end of the document, there are two side-by-side columns containing 'By:', 'Name:', 'Title:', 'Date:', and 'Company:' with blank lines. There should be no visible solid borders around or between the cells (though faint gridlines indicating a table structure might be visible in the editor).

task_completion.description: Verify the footer is correctly formatted on all pages except the first.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first page has no footer. Subsequent pages have a footer with 'CONFIDENTIAL — Meridian Legal Partners LLP' on the left side and a page number on the right side.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a GUI word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the document open in a graphical word processor application with toolbars and menus, not just terminal commands or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the signature block is an actual table and not just text aligned with spaces or tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for table formatting UI elements (like table boundaries, cell markers, or the table properties dialog) when the signature block is being edited, or perfectly aligned columns that indicate a table structure rather than jagged space-bar alignment.

integrity.description: Verify the footer and page numbers were configured using the word processor's header/footer and field features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The footer area should be distinctly separated from the main text body (often indicated by a dashed line or specific footer UI). Page numbers should appear as fields (often highlighted with a gray background in LibreOffice) rather than manually typed numbers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source document has 9 top-level section headings: Definitions, Scope of Services, Fees and Payment, Intellectual Property, Confidentiality, Representations and Warranties, Limitation of Liability, Indemnification, General Provisions. The Definitions section only contains 5 of the requested defined terms ('Services', 'Deliverables', 'Confidential Information', 'Intellectual Property Rights', and 'Force Majeure Event'); 'Effective Date' is referenced in the preamble but not formally defined in the Definitions section, so expect only 5 bolded terms in that section. The footer text must be exactly 'CONFIDENTIAL — Meridian Legal Partners LLP' on the left, with an auto-updating page number on the right, and must NOT appear on the first page.
